title: Checklist reporting
excerpt: Is there any way to track/report the checklist feature available in the updates section? As an example, the checklist feature shows you have marked 2 of 5 items complete for one task, and 2 of 8 for another. Is there a r…

posts.author: AshleyMiranti (Ashley Miranti)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to track/report the checklist feature available in the updates section? As an example, the checklist feature shows you have marked 2 of 5 items complete for one task, and 2 of 8 for another. Is there a reporting widget available to show 4 of 13 checklist items are complete?
